positive: A stylized, abstract portrait of a graceful fox's head emerging from a lush arrangement of neon bioluminescent flora. The composition is centered and symmetrical, featuring strong, clean silhouettes of the fox's ears and muzzle against a deep indigo and emerald background. The lighting is dramatic and high-contrast, utilizing radial glow effects and soft, ethereal backlighting to emphasize the clean lines of the subject. Art style should be a blend of Art Nouveau poster art and modern graphic illustration, with vibrant color blocking and a clean, scalable aesthetic suitable for apparel print. Full bleed, crisp vector quality, solid color zones.
